title: Under the algorithm's thumb
desc: According to Kasikorn Research Center, the number of layoffs, under Section 33 of the Social Security Act, has increased at an average rate of 7% per year. By 2026, it is projected that layoffs will remain high, at an average of no less than 40,000 per month. This is driven by factors such as a weak economy, intense competition, conflict between Iran and Israel and the United States, as well as...
title_cn: 算法掌控
summary_cn: 根据盘谷研究中心数据，泰国根据「社会保障法」第33条进行的裁员数量年均增长7%。预计到2026年，月均裁员人数将保持在40000人以上。经济疲软、市场竞争激烈、伊朗与以色列及美国的冲突等多重因素推高了失业率。
desc_original: According to Kasikorn Research Center, the number of layoffs, under Section 33 of the Social Security Act, has increased at an average rate of 7% per year. By 2026, it is projected that layoffs will remain high, at an average of no less than 40,000 per month. This is driven by factors such as a weak economy, intense competition, conflict between Iran and Israel and the United States, as well as...

title: Housing sector latest victim of war
desc: Given the sagging economy and conflict in the Middle East, the residential market is expected to contract for a fourth consecutive year in 2026, weighed down by persistent high household debt, rising living costs and tight lending, according to Siam Commercial Bank Economic Intelligence Center (EIC).
title_cn: 房产市场成战争受害者
summary_cn: 受经济疲软和中东地缘政治冲突影响，泰国住宅市场预计2026年将连续第四年萎缩。居民高负债、生活成本攀升和银行收紧融资是加剧这一困境的主要因素。根据盘谷商业银行经济情报中心分析，市场前景堪忧。
desc_original: Given the sagging economy and conflict in the Middle East, the residential market is expected to contract for a fourth consecutive year in 2026, weighed down by persistent high household debt, rising living costs and tight lending, according to Siam Commercial Bank Economic Intelligence Center (EIC).

title: Pundit urges growing fruit sales channels
desc: A marketing specialist recommends expanding sales channels and developing effective storytelling as strategies to address the fruit glut.
title_cn: 专家建议扩大水果销售渠道
summary_cn: 面对泰国水果过剩问题，市场营销专家建议商家拓展销售渠道、开发有效的品牌故事叙述策略，以提升销售表现和应对市场饱和压力。
desc_original: A marketing specialist recommends expanding sales channels and developing effective storytelling as strategies to address the fruit glut.

title: A prickly affair of durian
desc: Durian, dubbed the king of fruits, has ignited a lively discussion regarding the impact of live-streams hosted by popular influencers.
title_cn: 榴莲直播风波
summary_cn: 被誉为「果王」的榴莲近期因网红直播带货引发热议。直播博主的推介方式对榴莲销售的影响成为关注焦点，反映出泰国农产品营销在数字时代面临的新挑战和机遇。
desc_original: Durian, dubbed the king of fruits, has ignited a lively discussion regarding the impact of live-streams hosted by popular influencers.

title: Tracking down drug lord Thapanan
desc: Authorities are intensifying efforts to seize assets linked to Thapanan, alias "Noo Chen", a major narcotics trafficker whom police compare to the late drug lord Khun Sa for the scale of his operations and influence.
title_cn: 追捕毒枭他帕南
summary_cn: 泰国当局正加强对毒贩头目他帕南（绰号「努陈」）的追捕，并查扣其关联资产。这位毒品犯罪分子的活动规模和影响力被执法部门与传奇毒枭昆沙相提并论，成为国内反毒工作的重点目标。
desc_original: Authorities are intensifying efforts to seize assets linked to Thapanan, alias "Noo Chen", a major narcotics trafficker whom police compare to the late drug lord Khun Sa for the scale of his operations and influence.

title: Land Bridge faces uphill battle
desc: The Land Bridge project was initially promoted under the Pheu Thai government led by former prime minister Srettha Thavisin as both a bold geopolitical vision and a new national economic strategy aimed at helping Thailand escape the middle-income trap.
title_cn: 「陆地走廊」项目面临重重困难
summary_cn: 「陆地走廊」项目由前总理色他所领导的为泰党政府推进，作为大胆的地缘政治愿景和新国策，旨在帮助泰国突破中等收入陷阱。目前该项目面临诸多挑战。
desc_original: The Land Bridge project was initially promoted under the Pheu Thai government led by former prime minister Srettha Thavisin as both a bold geopolitical vision and a new national economic strategy aimed at helping Thailand escape the middle-income trap.

title: Proposal to overhaul agricultural policy
desc: Thai agriculture will never escape the cycle of debt if the government continues relying on cash handouts and debt moratoriums for farmers, according to a board member of the National Economic and Social Development Council.
title_cn: 农业政策全面改革提案
summary_cn: 国家经济社会发展委员会成员指出，政府继续依赖现金补贴和债务延期政策，泰国农业永远无法摆脱负债循环。必须进行根本性改革以实现可持续发展。
desc_original: Thai agriculture will never escape the cycle of debt if the government continues relying on cash handouts and debt moratoriums for farmers, according to a board member of the National Economic and Social Development Council.

title: PM eyes mafia tactic in Phuket
desc: Phuket: Prime Minister Anutin Charnvirakul has vowed zero tolerance for mafia-style intimidation in this southern resort province after receiving complaints from residents and businesses about harassment by criminal gangs and influential groups linked to encroachment on public land along Bang Tao beach.
title_cn: 总理誓言严打普吉岛黑道势力
summary_cn: 总理阿努廷在收到普吉岛班涛海滩（Bang Tao Beach）居民和商家关于黑帮团伙骚扰、非法占地的投诉后，承诺对黑道式欺凌行为实施零容忍政策。
desc_original: Phuket: Prime Minister Anutin Charnvirakul has vowed zero tolerance for mafia-style intimidation in this southern resort province after receiving complaints from residents and businesses about harassment by criminal gangs and influential groups linked to encroachment on public land along Bang Tao beach.

title: EM 'mandatory' for Thaksin  throughout parole period
desc: Former prime minister Thaksin Shinawatra will be required to wear an electronic monitoring (EM) bracelet during his parole period until Sept 9, after a Justice Ministry subcommittee reaffirmed on Sunday there were no grounds to revise the order.
title_cn: 他信整个假释期间须佩戴电子监控手环
summary_cn: 前总理他信·西那瓦在假释期间需全程佩戴电子监控手环至今年9月9日。司法部常设委员会周日再次确认，无充分理由修改该条件。
desc_original: Former prime minister Thaksin Shinawatra will be required to wear an electronic monitoring (EM) bracelet during his parole period until Sept 9, after a Justice Ministry subcommittee reaffirmed on Sunday there were no grounds to revise the order.

title: Thai government moves to stabilize durian and mangosteen prices ahead of harvest surge
desc: Suphajee Suthumpun visited Chanthaburi to discuss measures supporting durian and mangosteen prices as authorities prepare for a major increase in fruit supply later this month. CHANTHABURI, Thailand – Deputy Prime Minister and Commerce Minister Suphajee Suthumpun has visited Chanthaburi province to discuss plans to stabilize mangosteen and durian prices ahead of a major increase in fruit supply expected later this month. The meeting, held on May 9, included provincial officials, lawmakers, exporters, business groups, cooperatives, and local farmers. Authorities said this year’s durian market i
title_cn: 泰国政府稳定榴莲和山竹价格
summary_cn: 副总理兼商业部长苏帕杰访问尖竹汶府（Chanthaburi），与地方官员、议员、出口商和农民讨论稳定榴莲和山竹价格的措施。随着本月晚些时候收获季来临，政府采取行动防止价格下跌。
desc_original: Suphajee Suthumpun visited Chanthaburi to discuss measures supporting durian and mangosteen prices as authorities prepare for a major increase in fruit supply later this month. CHANTHABURI, Thailand – Deputy Prime Minister and Commerce Minister Suphajee Suthumpun has visited Chanthaburi province to discuss plans to stabilize mangosteen and durian prices ahead of a major increase in fruit supply expected later this month. title: Thai PM Anutin vows stronger action against Bang Tao Beach encroachment
desc: Prime Minister Anutin Charnvirakul said the government will intensify enforcement efforts against illegal land encroachment and criminal intimidation at Bang Tao Beach, while unveiling plans for a “Bang Tao Sandbox” model to address similar issues nationwide. PHUKET, Thailand – Prime Minister Anutin Charnvirakul said during his visit to Bang Tao Beach in Phuket province on May 10 that the government would intensify enforcement efforts against long-running public land encroachment and illegal activity along the beachfront. Anutin said authorities had received reports that residents were being t
title_cn: 泰总理阿努廷誓言加强打击邦涛海滩非法侵占
summary_cn: 泰国总理阿努廷 Anutin 在5月10日视察普吉岛邦涛海滩 Bang Tao Beach 时宣布，政府将加强执法力度，打击长期存在的公地侵占和海滩非法活动。据报道，居民曾遭到非法活动参与者的威胁和恐吓。政府还计划推出「邦涛沙盒」模式，以解决全国类似问题。

title: Thailand launches national mangrove seminar focused on Blue Carbon and climate goals
desc: Suchart Chomklin opened the 16th National Mangrove Seminar 2026 in Chanthaburi, where officials and conservation groups highlighted the role of mangrove forests and “Blue Carbon” in Thailand’s path toward net-zero emissions by 2050. CHANTHABURI, Thailand – Natural Resources and Environment Minister Suchart Chomklin has presided over the launch of the 16th National Mangrove Seminar 2026 in Chanthaburi province, where officials and environmental groups discussed mangrove conservation and the role of “Blue Carbon” in Thailand’s climate policies. title_cn: 泰国启动全国红树林研讨会，聚焦蓝碳与气候目标
summary_cn: 泰国自然资源与环境部长苏查特 Suchart 主持了在尖竹汶省 Chanthaburi 召开的第16届全国红树林研讨会2026。会议讨论了红树林保护和「蓝碳」在泰国2050年实现碳中和目标中的作用。官员和环保组织强调了红树林生态系统在应对气候变化中的关键角色。
desc_original: Suchart Chomklin opened the 16th National Mangrove Seminar 2026 in Chanthaburi, where officials and conservation groups highlighted the role of mangrove forests and “Blue Carbon” in Thailand’s path toward net-zero emissions by 2050. title: Thai government orders investigation into alleged home construction fraud in Northeast
desc: Supamas Isarabhakdi has ordered an investigation into a contractor accused of abandoning home construction projects across northeastern Thailand, with reported losses exceeding 45 million baht. BANGKOK, Thailand – Minister Attached to the Prime Minister’s Office Supamas Isarabhakdi has ordered legal action and an urgent investigation into a home construction contractor accused of defrauding homeowners across northeastern Thailand, with reported damages exceeding 45 million baht. The case involves a home construction contractor accused of defrauding homeowners across several northeastern provin
title_cn: 泰国政府下令调查东北部房屋建筑欺诈案
summary_cn: 总理办公室附属部长苏帕玛斯 Supamas 下令对一家建筑承包商进行法律诉讼和紧急调查。该承包商被控在泰国东北部多个地区欺诈购房者，涉及损失超过4500万泰铢。案件涉及多个省份的购房者，承包商涉嫌遗弃房屋建筑项目，造成严重经济损失。
desc_original: Supamas Isarabhakdi has ordered an investigation into a contractor accused of abandoning home construction projects across northeastern Thailand, with reported losses exceeding 45 million baht. title: Hong Kong activist Zhang Xinyan arrested in Thailand
desc: Hong Kong activist Zhang Xinyan arrested in Thailand Legacy Hong Kong activist Zhang Xinyan, a wanted member of the overseas group Hong Kong Parliament , has been arrested in Thailand for overstaying her visa and is reportedly set to be deported to mainland China . According to the South China Morning Post, Hong Kong Parliament is an overseas pro-democracy activist group mainly founded and run by self-exiled Hong Kong activists. Sunai Phasuk, senior Thailand researcher for Human Rights Watch, posted on X yesterday, May 9, saying Zhang had been arrested by Thai authorities. According to him, 55
title_cn: 香港活动人士张新燕在泰国被捕
summary_cn: 香港活动人士张新燕因逾期停留泰国被泰国当局逮捕，面临被遣返中国。张新燕是海外民主倡导组织「香港议会」的成员，该组织主要由自我流亡的香港活动人士创立和运营。人权观察组织泰国高级研究员苏奈 Sunai 在5月9日证实了这一逮捕。
desc_original: Hong Kong activist Zhang Xinyan arrested in Thailand Legacy Hong Kong activist Zhang Xinyan, a wanted member of the overseas group Hong Kong Parliament , has been arrested in Thailand for overstaying her visa and is reportedly set to be deported to mainland China . title: Bangkok MP questions AOT fee hike despite billion-baht profits
desc: Bangkok MP questions AOT fee hike despite billion-baht profits Legacy Bangkok MP Suphanat Minchaiynunt has questioned the government over AOT’s planned airport fee increase from 730 baht to 1,120 baht per international departure passenger from June 20, 2026. The increase of more than 50% has drawn public debate amid rising living costs and higher travel expenses. AOT cited the need to fund airport improvements to meet ICAO standards. Suphanat Minchaiynunt of the People’s Party questioned the government and the transport minister over why they agreed with the AOT airport fee rise. He asked whet
title_cn: 曼谷议员质疑机场管理局费用上涨决定，尽管利润可观
summary_cn: 曼谷议员苏帕纳特 Suphanat 质疑政府为何同意泰国机场管理局 AOT 的机场费用上涨计划，即从2026年6月20日起，国际出境乘客费用从730泰铢增至1120泰铢，涨幅超50%。在生活成本上升和旅行费用增加的背景下，此举引发公众讨论。机场管理局称需为符合国际民航组织 ICAO 标准的机场改善融资。

title: Police gun linked to Chinese suspect and C4 explosives traced
desc: Police gun linked to Chinese suspect and C4 explosives traced Legacy A police-issued firearm from Sai Mai Police Station passed through four officers’ hands before ending up with a Chinese suspect found in possession of C4 explosives and a weapons cache , police revealed yesterday. Following a meeting called by the police chief to discuss the case of 31 year old Ming Chen Sun, the suspect told officers he purchased the weapons online due to a fascination with firearms and intended to use them for self-harm. Police remain sceptical, citing several suspicious points, and are now investigat
title_cn: 警枪流向中国嫌疑人案：缴获C4爆炸物及武器库
summary_cn: 赛美警察局一把公务枪支经四名警官之手，最后流入中国嫌疑人Ming Chen Sun（31岁）手中。该嫌疑人携带C4炸药及多支武器，声称网购枪械源于个人兴趣，意图自伤。警方对其说法持怀疑态度，正深入调查多个可疑之处。

title: AI camera catches Nigerian, Ivorian men overstaying in Phuket
desc: AI camera catches Nigerian, Ivorian men overstaying in Phuket Legacy Tourist police in Phuket arrested two foreign nationals who had allegedly overstayed their visas for more than two years after an AI facial recognition system flagged them on May 8 in Kathu district. The arrests were made during a crackdown on foreigners suspected of immigration offences and other illegal activity in major tourist areas. Tourist police said the operation followed orders to increase checks on overstayers and suspicious individuals in Phuket. Photo via DailyNews Officers used a Mobile AI Camera system installed
title_cn: AI人脸识别逮捕普吉岛超期居留外国人
summary_cn: 普吉岛旅游警察通过AI人脸识别系统在卡图区（Kathu）识别并逮捕两名超期居留超过两年的外籍男子，分别来自尼日利亚和科特迪瓦。此次行动为打击超期居留者及可疑人员的专项整治一部分，旅游警察已接令加强对普吉岛主要旅游区域的边检力度。

title: Pattaya man lured, shot dead over suspected romantic dispute
desc: Pattaya man lured, shot dead over suspected romantic dispute Legacy A man was shot dead in Pattaya early this morning, May 10, after being lured to a meeting spot through a chat account believed to have been used to impersonate a woman he had been dating. The shooting happened at about 3.56am in Sukhumvit Pattaya Soi 15/12 in Na Kluea subdistrict, Bang Lamung district, Chon Buri. The victim, identified only as 34 year old Apichai, was found lying face down beside the road with a gunshot wound to the head. Police recovered a .38mm shell casing from the scene while the gunman fled before officer
title_cn: 芭提雅男子遭诱杀：疑恋爱纠纷所致
summary_cn: 芭提雅一名34岁男子阿皮差（Apichai）在素坤逸路分路15/12（Sukhumvit Soi 15/12）遭诱杀身亡。嫌疑人通过冒充女性的聊天账户将受害者骗至现场，随后开枪击中其头部致命。警方在现场缴获.38毫米弹壳，枪手逃逸，警方推测与恋爱纠纷相关。

title: Buriram frog hunter flees 10 armed Cambodian soldiers inside Thai territory
desc: Buriram frog hunter flees 10 armed Cambodian soldiers inside Thai territory Legacy A 63 year old man from Ban Kruat district, Buriram province, got the fright of his life while frog hunting near a dam behind his village, after stumbling upon ten armed Cambodian soldiers on what he believes was Thai soil. Apirak Butphet was out with two companions when they spotted three flashlights in the dark. Assuming they were fellow villagers, he approached and asked about their catch, only to find himself face to face with soldiers carrying guns and knives. title_cn: 武里南捕蛙人逃脱边境柬埔寨士兵
summary_cn: 武里南班克瑞县（Ban Kruat）一名63岁村民在村后大坝附近捕青蛙时，突然遭遇10名手持枪支和刀具的柬埔寨士兵。村民受惊后逃离现场，声称士兵当时位于泰国领土范围内。双方对峙期间未发生冲突，相关部门正调查此事。

title: Bangkok road collapse linked to siphon pipe works
desc: Bangkok road collapse linked to siphon pipe works Legacy A road collapse near Bangkok’s Fai Chai intersection disrupted traffic yesterday, May 9, and caused a passing motorcyclist to fall , with officials linking the damage to siphon pipe installation beneath the road. The collapse reportedly happened at about 2.42pm on Charan Sanitwong Road outside Vichaivej Hospital in Bangkok Noi district. Witnesses said one traffic lane collapsed as a motorcycle was passing through the area, causing the rider to fall. No serious injuries were reported. Officials closed traffic near Charan Sanitwong Soi 28/
title_cn: 曼谷街道塌陷：虹吸管施工引发
summary_cn: 曼谷佛统区慈爱医院外的查兰砂尼特翁路于5月9日下午2时42分发生路面塌陷，导致一名摩托车驾驶员跌倒，幸无严重伤亡。官方认定塌陷与路下虹吸管安装工程相关。当局已关闭该路段附近交通，正评估修缮方案。

title: McLaren 570S wedged under pickup truck in Sai Mai crash
desc: McLaren 570S wedged under pickup truck in Sai Mai crash Legacy A McLaren 570S worth up to 24 million baht collided with a pickup truck at the end of Chatuchot Alley in Sai Mai district yesterday, injuring one person and drawing widespread attention online. Photo courtesy of KhaoSod At 4.36pm, the supercar and a pickup truck collided at the end of the alley. One man was left with right arm pain and was transported to Phyathai Nawamin Hospital by Sai Mai Volunteer Centre vehicle No. 7, unit 1808. title_cn: 迈凯伦570S跑车卡在皮卡车下——赛玛区撞车事件
summary_cn: 一辆价值2400万泰铢的迈凯伦570S超级跑车与皮卡车在曼谷赛玛区Chatuchot Alley尾端发生碰撞。事故于下午4点36分发生，造成一名男子右臂受伤，随后由赛玛区志愿中心送往Phyathai Nawamin医院接受治疗。这起豪车碰撞事件在社交媒体引起广泛关注。
